suite.name: cadastroCliente

kw.name: Run Keywords
kw.doc: Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

kw.name: Conecta ao banco de dados
kw.doc: Keyword utilizada para realizar a conexão com o banco de dados.

kw.name: Connect To Database
kw.doc: Creates a database connection using the DB API 2.0 ``db_module`` and the parameters provided. Along with listed commonly used arguments (`db_name`, `db_host` etc.) you can set any other DB module specific parameters as key/value pairs.
kw.msg: Connect to DB using : psycopg2.connect(database='ws', user='wssim', password=***, host='10.171.217.166', port=9000)

kw.name: Configura parametros padroes do sistema
kw.doc: Injeta toda a massa necessária para os combos e campos obrigatórios.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: \n⚙️ Injetando Massa de Dados no Postgres...
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Catenate
kw.arg: UPDATE wsconfigentidade SET idnpermitevisualizar = 1, idnpermiteeditar = 1, idnpermitecadastrar = 1;

UPDATE wsconfigentidadecampo SET idnobrigatorio = 1 WHERE labelcampo IN ('tipocliente', 'descricao', 'cidade', 'nome', 'parceiro', 'idnativo', 'profissional', 'sgltipopessoa', 'telefone', 'email', 'razaosocial', 'idnpessoafisica', 'cpf', 'login', 'perfilacesso', 'idnpadrao', 'datainicio', 'logradouro', 'nomeparceiro', 'numero', 'cnpj', 'nomeparceirofantasia');

INSERT INTO classificacaoparceiro (idclassificacaoparceiro, idnativo, percentualdesconto, descricao, sglclassificacao, ordem, codigoerp, wsversao) SELECT 99999, 1, 0, 'CLASSIFICACAO AUTOMACAO', 'AUTO', 1, 'CT#AUTO', 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM classificacaoparceiro WHERE idclassificacaoparceiro = 99999);

INSERT INTO grupoparceiro (idgrupoparceiro, idnativo, descricao, codigoerp, wsversao, sglgrupoparceiro) SELECT 99999, 1, 'GRUPO AUTOMACAO', 'CT#AUTO', 1, 'AUTO' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM grupoparceiro WHERE idgrupoparceiro = 99999);

INSERT INTO tipologia (idtipologia, idnativo, descricao, codigo, sgltipologia, codigoerp, wsversao) SELECT 99999, 1, 'TIPOLOGIA AUTOMACAO', 'AUTO', 'AUT', 'CT#AUTO', 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tipologia WHERE idtipologia = 99999);

INSERT INTO regiao (idregiao, descricao, codigo, idnativo, codigoerp, wsversao) SELECT 99999, 'REGIAO AUTOMACAO', 'AUTO', 1, 'CT#AUTO', 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM regiao WHERE idregiao = 99999);

INSERT INTO segmento (idsegmento, descricao, idnativo, codigo, sigla, idnconsomecotasupervisor, codigoerp, wsversao) SELECT 99999, 'SEGMENTO AUTOMACAO', 1, 'AUTO', 'AUT', 0, 'CT#AUTO', 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM segmento WHERE idsegmento = 99999);
kw.doc: Catenates the given items together and returns the resulted string.

kw.name: Execute Sql String
kw.doc: Executes the ``sql_string`` - as a single SQL command (default) or as separate statements.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Abre navegador
kw.doc: Irá abrir a aplicação web no navegador previamente informado.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Realiza login na plataforma web
kw.doc: Irá realizar o login na plataforma web utilizando os dados informados no arquivo de variáveis.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

test.name: Teste 002 ::: Cadastro de cliente Pessoa Jurídica

kw.name: Acessa tela de cadastro de cliente
Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Test Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current test.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Get WebElement
kw.doc: Returns the first WebElement matching the given ``locator``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: arguments[0].click(); By using argument: '<selenium.webdriver.remote.webelement.WebElement (session="6c828334d3215659611a270e90e4ed13", element="f.CEDB8A91518635874E48B765E77B86A0.d.1575D8148E7C76B719C54AFF9A4F91DA.e.270")>'

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
kw.msg: Typing text 'Cliente Auto PJ 1775067443745' into text field 'name=parceiro_nomeparceiro'.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
kw.msg: Typing text 'Cliente Auto PJ 1775067443745' into text field 'name=parceiro_nomeparceirofantasia'.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=(//*[@name='pessoajuridica_atividadeseconomica']/..//*[contains(@class, 'ui-button') or contains(@class, 'icon-search')])[1]' did not appear in 15 seconds.

kw.name: Get WebElement
kw.doc: Returns the first WebElement matching the given ``locator``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Selecionar primeira opcao valida do select
Preenche dados de complemento pessoa juridica
Entra em modo de edicao apos salvar
Valida cliente no banco de dados

test.doc: DTSFASAPP-T76: Realiza o fluxo completo de cadastro de PJ e valida no BD.
test.status: Element 'xpath=(//*[@name='pessoajuridica_atividadeseconomica']/..//*[contains(@class, 'ui-button') or contains(@class, 'icon-search')])[1]' did not appear in 15 seconds.

test.name: Teste 005 ::: Cadastro de cliente Pessoa Física com Contato

kw.name: Select From List By Label
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``labels``.
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'name=local_unidadefederativa' by label PARANA.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Select From List By Label
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``labels``.
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'name=local_cidade' by label CASCAVEL (PR).

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Entra em modo de edicao apos salvar

test.doc: Fluxo E2E importado do Cypress: Cria PF, insere contato e valida no BD.
test.status: Element 'xpath=//input[@name='local_idnisentoie']/..//label' did not appear in 15 seconds.

kw.name: Disconnect From Database
kw.doc: Disconnects from the database.

suite.doc: Arquivo utilizado para armazenar os testes relativos a cadastro de clientes.
